ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: In the Name of Allah—the Most Compassionate, Most Merciful.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, Lord of the worlds -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: All praise is for Allah—Lord of all worlds,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: The Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful,
Sovereign of the Day of Recompense.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Master of the Day of Judgment.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: It is You we worship and You we ask for help.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: You ˹alone˺ we worship and You ˹alone˺ we ask for help.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Guide us to the straight path -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Guide us along the Straight Path,

ayahs.textArabic: صِرَٰطَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنۡعَمۡتَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ غَيۡرِ ٱلۡمَغۡضُوبِ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَا ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Sirata allatheena anAAamta AAalayhim ghayri almaghdoobi AAalayhim wala alddalleena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: The path of those upon whom You have bestowed favor, not of those who have evoked [Your] anger or of those who are astray.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: the Path of those You have blessed—not those You are displeased with, or those who are astray.
